3277540.name: Last 22
3277540.description:
Las 22 is a survival game set in a dark and dangerous post-apocalyptic world. A deadly virus has not only wiped out much of humanity but has left the remaining survivors in a desperate struggle for resources and survival. As the player, you must guide a family through 22 days of life-or-death challenges, facing not only zombies but also bandits and other dangers that lurk in this grim world.

Each day brings a new test, and every choice you make will shape the family's chances of survival. Strategy and resource management are key, as food, water, and bullets have become the new currency in this broken world.

Key Features:

• Survive in a zombie-infested post-apocalyptic world.

• Experience rich character-driven dialogues and an immersive storyline.

• Gather resources, fight zombies, and make strategic decisions to keep your family alive.

• Multiple choices and endings based on your decisions.

• High replayability with intense and atmospheric gameplay.
3277540.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 波兰语, 俄语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语
